# PERF-227 negative: pooled flate writer with Reset (BestSpeed)
lang: go
file: PERF-227-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"compress/flate"
	"sync"
)

type writerHolder struct {
	w *flate.Writer
}

var zwPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any {
		return &writerHolder{}
	},
}

func CompressPage(page []byte) []byte {
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	h := zwPool.Get().(*writerHolder)
	if h.w == nil {
		h.w, _ = flate.NewWriter(&buf, flate.BestSpeed)
	} else {
		h.w.Reset(&buf)
	}
	_, _ = h.w.Write(page)
	_ = h.w.Close()
	zwPool.Put(h)
	return buf.Bytes()
}
